data.title: Investors anxious as Oracle's shares drop due to concerns about AI investment, especially in OpenAI.
data.description: Investors are showing concern as shares in the technology company have dropped amidst worries that its investment in artificial intelligence, specifically in OpenAI, might not yield the expected returns.

data.title: Retatrutide by Eli Lilly resulted in significant weight loss in study, surpassing approved drugs with targeting 3 hormones.
data.description: The company behind Zepbound released findings from a research study on retatrutide, a drug that interacts with three hormones in the body. The study showed a significantly higher amount of weight loss compared to currently approved medications.

data.title: Trump to select new Fed Chair amid divided board; aims for lower borrowing costs, but Fed may resist cuts without economic justification.
data.description: President Trump is advocating for significant reductions in borrowing costs, whereas central bank officials seem prepared to oppose additional cuts unless the economic conditions justify such actions.

data.title: Airline's obscure rules in fine print caught some passengers off guard in 2025. Shocking cases revealed.
data.description: In 2025, several readers were caught off guard by obscure and sometimes illogical rules found in the fine print. These unexpected regulations may come as a surprise to many, highlighting the importance of carefully reviewing all terms and conditions.

data.title: Disappointed guests find Hollywood Studio Tour lackluster due to absence of movie production, describing it as tired and lackluster.
data.description: Hosting a studio tour becomes challenging when the studio is no longer producing movies on-site. According to one visitor, there was a sense of weariness, signaling the conclusion of an era.

data.title: Ford is revamping its fleet with a Silicon Valley-style team near LA to keep up with Chinese competitors. Will it work?
data.description: In an effort to keep pace with Chinese automakers, Ford is revamping its lineup with the help of a Silicon Valley-inspired team. The move comes as Ford strives to close the gap in sales numbers, with the company falling behind Chinese automakers in recent years. The redesign will involve a complete overhaul of their fleet to incorporate cutting-edge technology and innovation. However, the question remains whether Ford's efforts may have come too late to compete effectively in the increasingly competitive market.

data.title: At the recent DealBook Summit, discussions highlighted the significant influence of the White House on business in the current environment.
data.description: During the recent DealBook Summit, it was acknowledged that under the Trump administration, businesses are closely intertwined with the White House more than ever.

data.title: At the DealBook Summit, leaders from tech, finance, education, and the arts engage in a discussion, sparking dialogue on pressing issues.
data.description: Individuals from diverse backgrounds including technology, finance, education, and the arts came together for a lunchtime panel discussion. The event aimed to initiate dialogue on pressing issues and attracted participants from both public and private sectors.

data.title: DealBook Summit features panelists discussing global alliances amid President Trump's controversial moves towards Ukraine, Venezuela, and China.
data.description: Panelists on a DealBook task force highlighted several areas of concern regarding President Trump's actions. They praised some positive moves, but expressed worry about serious missteps in countries such as Ukraine, Venezuela, and particularly China.

data.title: Panel at DealBook Summit: College leaders discuss challenges like government pressure and preparing graduates for new world. #EducationLeaders #DealBookSummit
data.description: During a panel discussion at the DealBook Summit, college and university leaders highlighted various obstacles they encounter, including government scrutiny and the need to equip graduates for a rapidly evolving global landscape. The panelists emphasized the significance of addressing these challenges to ensure the success of higher education institutions in navigating the uncertainties of the future.

data.title: Bitcoin rises to $91,000 post Fed rate cut, Ethereum at $3,207.67, XRP at $2.01, Dogecoin at $0.1391. 148,737 traders liquidated $502.16 million in 24 hours.
data.description: Bitcoin has surged above $91,000, following the Federal Reserve's recent 25 basis points reduction. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) at $91,110, Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) at $3,207.67, Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) at $134.99, XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) at $2.01, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) at $0.1391, and Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) at $0.058405. Data from Coinglass reveals that 148,737 traders faced liquidation in the last day, amounting to $502.16 million. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: REAL Shows Network adds Silicon Valley Unlocked series showcasing San Francisco Bay Area on TV.报道网络 (RSN) 新增《硅谷解锁》系列。Hosted in Silicon Valley, the series aims to highlight the area's real estate and lifestyle.
data.description: In Silicon Valley, California, on December 11, 2025, REAL Shows Network (RSN) announced the launch of a new TV series called Silicon Valley Unlocked, which focuses on real estate and lifestyle topics. This locally hosted show in the San Francisco Bay Area is now part of RSN's programming lineup. This addition aims to provide viewers with insights into the region's real estate market and lifestyle trends.

data.title: APU adopts new membership model to enhance Alaska Native governance, increasing shared leadership with Tribes and partners.
data.description: In a significant development, APU has adopted a new governing model that involves Tribes, Tribal organizations, and partners in collaborative leadership, furthering its self-determined goal of being an Alaska Native University. This transition occurred in 2016 when APU first became a Tribally governed University. The university is based in Anchorage, Alaska, and this update was announced on December 11, 2025. This move aims to strengthen Indigenous representation in the university's leadership structure and forge stronger connections with Tribal entities and partners.

data.title: 10 tech startups complete 2025 Geekz Ventures GROWTH Pre-Accelerator in Atlanta from various industries.
data.description: In Atlanta on December 11, 2025, news broke that ten innovative tech startups have successfully graduated from Geekz Ventures GROWTH pre-accelerator program. These startups hail from diverse sectors such as media, SaaS, fintech, and entertainment, chosen from a large pool of applicants in a rigorous selection process.

data.title: Amica's COO Ted Murphy retires after 45 years; shaped growth and innovation, leaving a lasting impact.
data.description: In Lincoln, Rhode Island, Amica Mutual Insurance Company revealed leadership updates. Ted Murphy, the Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Operations Officer, will retire at the close of 2025 after 45 years with the company. Murphy’s influence and dedication have been instrumental in guiding Amica's progress and creativity, significantly impacting both the organization and its staff. His departure marks the end of an era, highlighting his significant contributions.

data.title: University of Phoenix and Oklahoma City Community College establish a transfer pathway for students, streamlining the process. PHOENIX, Dec. 11, 2025 - PRNewswire.
data.description: University of Phoenix recently established an academic agreement with Oklahoma City Community College (OCCC) to facilitate the transfer process for students pursuing higher degrees. This collaboration aims to provide a seamless pathway for students to transition from OCCC to University of Phoenix. The agreement, announced on December 11, 2025, is set to benefit a significant number of students seeking educational advancement opportunities.
